calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Tanya Purifoy.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Natasha Van Buren is present.
Attorney Laura Keenan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUN-25-2012 is vacated.
